roa.docketEntryComment: Order - Sheriff's Affidavit Warrant Recalled on 3/11/23
PEO MOTION TO ADD TO CALENDAR FOR RECALL OF BENCH WARRANT AND DISMISSAL OF CASE PER PC 1381 LAST DAY 10/13/22
/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/MO GRTD/EMMOD:HOME DETENTION IS TERMINATED, ALL OTHER GPS-RELEASE CONDITIONS REMAIN THE SAME/X:THE 11-13-20 TRIAL IS CONFIRMED/
/CAL: TRIAL AND STATUS, LD 08-24-20 (COVID19 08-24-20)/CAUSE/CONTD: DEFENSE'S MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS ON 10-08-20/DAWF/CONTD: TRIAL ON11-13-20/SB: 3 HOURS/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/X:DEFENSE'S OBJECTIONS & CONCERNS STATED ON RECORD/X:PEOPLE INDICATED THEY WILL ADD A CHARGE/WIT SWORN:OFF, RACHEL LEUNG/WIT SWORN:OFF, CHRISTOPHER FLORES/HTA1:1,2,3/DEF: TO REMAIN ON ACM STATUS/ACM/X:PD AVALOS REQUESTED THE ARRAIGNMENT DATE BE SCHEDULED ON 06-24-20/TWA/DEF:PERSONALLY WAIVED TIME/DEF:'S REQUEST TO LIFT GPS REQUIREMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT ON THE INFORMATION ON 06-24-20 IN D-22/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE PEOPLE ARE NOT READY/X:COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE THE MATTER/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE 05-27-20/DAWF/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING 06-04-20/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/PD/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMUR,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TOCOMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY; SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX:05-22-20 (30TH GCF COVID-19) & 06-09-20 (60TH GCF COVID-19)/CONTD:PRELIM HRG ON 05-21-20/DOP/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL, LD 08-24-20/DAWT/CTORD:ACM MODIFIED: DEFENDANT REPORT BYPHONE ONLY/CAUSE/CONT/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 08-24-20/CONTD: JURY TRIAL/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 28/TRANS 28:FORTHWITH FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
